items.hook: Austro-Prussian War: Battle of Lissa: The Austrian Navy, led by Admiral Wilhelm von Tegetthoff, defeats the Italian Navy near the island of Vis in the Adriatic Sea.
items.body: The Austro-Prussian War was fought in 1866 between the Austrian Empire and the Kingdom of Prussia, with each also being aided by various allies within the German Confederation. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: I Hadn't Meant to Tell You This is a book targeted towards young adults published in 1994 by Jacqueline Woodson.
items.body: The story takes place in Chauncey, Ohio, and it focuses on the growing friendship between a black girl native to this town named Marie and a white girl her age by the name of Lena. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Friend is a novel by American writer Sigrid Nunez published by Riverhead Books in 2018.
items.body: The book concerns an unnamed novelist who adopts a Great Dane that belonged to a deceased friend and mentor. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Somali Airlines Flight 40 crashes in Balad, Somalia, killing 50 people.
items.body: On 20 July 1981, Somali Airlines Flight 40, a Fokker F27-600 Friendship operating a daily scheduled domestic passenger flight from Mogadishu International Airport to Hargeisa Airport, Somalia, crashed near the town of Balad a few minutes after takeoff killing all 44 passengers and 6 crew members on board. One of those things you can't un-know.
